prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第62位→2026年第57位，排名持续上升，学校综合实 力稳步提升；2024年声誉评价为中性/混合，2026年声誉文件中无该校负面条目；抖音综合热度排名第7（高热），短视频曝光量大，张雪峰多次推荐为"性价比 很高的211"，报考关注度较高；化学工程与技术（A）、化学（A-）、材料科学与工程（A-），三个A-及以上学科，化工为传统王牌，材料科学实力突出。
6. 【专业热度与环境】计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度高热推荐；化工、材料类（生化环材方向）社会热度偏低（一般观望至明显劝退）；本省2026年物 理类考生约14.4万人（按历史比例估算），与2025年基本持平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 学校位于北京市，对辽宁考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次因中美双学位项目异常后移、2026年扩招约6.1%、抖音高热关注度及软科排名上升等因素；考虑到2025年异常下滑后普通类位次可能有所回调，结合考生规模持平、学校声誉稳定，在基准上适度回调约200名；预测最低位次约17029名，区间16529–17529名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（电子信息工程、人工智能、计算机科学与技术）
- 工科试验班（宏德书院）（化学工程与工艺、高分子材料与工程）
- 化学（基础拔尖）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（自动化、测控技术与仪器）
- 化学工程与工艺（化工、大数据双学士学位）
- 工科试验班（卓越工程师学院）（化学工程与工艺、环境工程、生物工程等）
- 材料科学与工程（材料、大数据双学士学位）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（先进材料）（高分子材料与工程、材料科学与工程、功能材料）
- 工科试验班（化工能源与生物医药）
- 理科试验班（绿色化学）（应用化学、能源化学、资源化学）
- 理科试验班（数学、物理电子与管理）
- 环境工程（环工、大数据双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约17029名，区间16529–17529名。位次在区间内建议以二档工科试验班（卓越工程师学院、高端装备与智能制造）为主力，一档计算机类、宏德书院可冲刺；位次优于 区间下限（16529以内）可重点冲一档计算机类及宏德书院；位次接近区间上限（17529左右）建议以三档为主、二档为辅保底。化工、材料为学校王牌学科，虽社会热度一般但学 科实力强，适合对化工材料有兴趣的考生。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9467 → 11008 → 10575 → 10100 → 16621. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable in the 9500–11000 range. In 2025, due to the Sino-US dual degree program, it dropped to 16621, showing a significant backward shift. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 16621. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 79 in 2021, 80 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 82 in 2024, and 82 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 87, an increase of 5 from 2025 (about 6.1% expansion), which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 62nd in 2021 → 57th in 2026, with a continuously rising ranking and steadily improving comprehensive strength. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, and in 2026, there were no negative entries for this school in the reputation document. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranked 7th (high heat), with high short video exposure. Zhang Xuefeng has repeatedly recommended it as a '211 with high cost-performance,' attracting high application attention. It has three A- or above disciplines: Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Chemistry (A-), and Materials Science and Engineering (A-). Chemical engineering is the traditional ace, and materials science is outstanding.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] Popular majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have high social heat and are strongly recommended. Chemical and Materials majors (biochemical and environmental materials direction) have low social heat (generally wait-and-see to obvious discouragement). In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is about 144,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), roughly the same as in 2025.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The school is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Liaoning examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal drop in 2025 ranking due to the Sino-US dual degree program, the 2026 expansion of about 6.1%, high Douyin attention, and rising Soft Science ranking; taking into account the possible rebound of regular class rankings after the abnormal decline in 2025, combined with a stable number of examinees and stable school reputation, a moderate adjustment of about 200 places upward from the baseline is made. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17029, with a range of 16529–17529.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Category (Electronic Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy) (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Chemistry (Basic Top-notch).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation Category (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Outstanding Engineer College) (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Environmental Engineering, Biological Engineering, etc.)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials, Big Data Dual Degree)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials) (Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Functional Materials)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Energy and Biomedical)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry) (Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, Resource Chemistry)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics Electronics and Management)
- Environmental Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 17029, with a range of 16529–17529. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Outstanding Engineer College, High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) as the main choice, and Tier 1 Computer Category and Hongde Academy can be attempted as reach options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 16529), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Computer Category and Hongde Academy. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 17529), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 options, supplemented by Tier 2 as safety choices. Chemical engineering and materials are the school's ace disciplines. Although their social heat is average, their disciplinary strength is strong, making them suitable for examinees interested in chemical engineering and materials.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程 、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第57位，近年排名持续上升，综合实力稳步增强；2024年声誉评价为中性/混合，2026年声誉文件中无该校负面条 目；抖音综合热度排名第7（高热），报考关注度较高；化学工程与技术（A）、化学（A-）、材料科学与工程（A-），以理工科为主，文科专业非学校核心优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度分化观望（偏热但竞争激烈），工商管理类社会热度分化观望；本省2026年历史类考生约5.6万人（按历史比例估算），较2025年略 有增加；学校位于北京市，对辽宁考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025年基准约2100名、2026年招生计划持平、历史类考生规模略增、抖音高热关注度等因素；考虑到考生规模小幅增加及报考热度上升，在基准上适度 上调约30名；预测最低位次约2130名，区间1747–2513名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（卓越实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工商管理类（新文科经管法）（财务管理、会计学、工商管理、国际经济与贸易、行政管理、公共事业管理、法学）。

三档（相对好进）
- 暂无其他历史类招生专业（2026年计划含行政管理、国际经济与贸易（数智方向）等新增专业，位次待验证）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2130名，区间1747–2513名。历史类招生专业较少，法学（卓越实验班）为一档冲刺目标，工商管理类为二档主力；位次优于区间下限（1747以内）可重点冲法学卓越 实验班；位次接近区间上限（2513左右）以工商管理类为主。学校文科非核心优势，但北京地域和211层次仍具吸引力。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1860 → 2189 → 2717 → 2076 → 2100, fluctuating within the range of 1860–2717. In the recent three years (2023–2025), it ranged between 2076 and 2717, with a baseline of about 2100 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 10 students in 2021, 12 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 12 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 12 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a continuously rising ranking in recent years and steadily strengthening comprehensive strength. The 2024 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, and the 2026 reputation file contains no negative entries for this university. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 7th (high heat), indicating high application attention. Its strengths include Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Chemistry (A-), and Materials Science and Engineering (A-), with a focus on science and engineering; liberal arts majors are not the university's core advantage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a socially divided and wait-and-see popularity (somewhat hot but competitive), while Business Administration categories also have a socially divided and wait-and-see popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is approximately 56,000 (estimated based on historical proportion), slightly increased from 2025. The university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Liaoning examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of approximately 2100, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in the number of History Category examinees, and high Douyin attention, the baseline is moderately adjusted upward by about 30 places due to the slight increase in examinee numbers and rising application heat. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2130, with a range of 1747–2513.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2130, range 1747–2513. History Category has few enrollment majors; Law (Excellent Experimental Class) is a Tier 1 target, while Business Administration Category is the main Tier 2 option. If your ranking is better than the lower limit (within 1747), focus on aiming for the Law Excellent Experimental Class. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 2513), prioritize Business Administration Category. The university's liberal arts are not its core strength, but the Beijing location and 211 status remain attractive.
